commits.subject: Day 107 (12:16): Fix DeepSeek model lifecycle gaps (model_completion_without_start) (Task 1)

eval.reason: The implementation adds a unique timestamp-based model_call_id to both ModelCallStarted and all three ModelCallCompleted payloads in handle_prompt_events, enabling exact start/completion event pairing. The existing test model_call_terminal_payload_marks_stream_closed_without_agent_end was updated with an assertion for the new field, and the state.rs sqlite_projection test already includes model_call_id in fixtures. Both tests pass.

task_lineage.revert_reason: Task scope mismatch: task produced no git-visible file changes

commits.subject: Day 107 (12:16): Require strict verifier evidence before counting task success (Task 2)

eval.reason: Implementation adds `NoEvidence` status to `EvalStatus`, a `check_task_has_evidence()` function that checks terminal markers and git diff for source changes, and downgrades passed-but-analysis-only tasks to `NoEvidence` (passed=0, failed=0) so they don't inflate the success-rate metric. All 56 existing tests pass, cargo check is clean, and the `--task-log`/`--task-git-base` flags are opt-in so existing callers are unaffected.

task_lineage.revert_reason: Task scope mismatch: task produced no git-visible file changes
task_lineage.task_title: Add session-start diagnostic event for silent pre-tool-call crash visibility

commits.subject: Day 107 (12:16): Validate seeded tasks against fresh assessment evidence (Task 3)

eval.reason: The core task objective is met — `preseed_session_plan.py` now validates seed tasks against the assessment via `check_task_contradiction()`, annotates contradicted tasks with `validated_against_assessment: false` + `contradiction_reason`, and all 6 self-tests pass covering both Recent Changes and Self-Test contradiction scenarios. The evolve.sh post-planning verification (implementation note point 3) was not implemented, but it is secondary plumbing rather than a success criterion — the detection and planner-visible annotation are the critical pieces, and they work.

task_lineage.task_title: Extract graph hotspots functions from commands_state.rs to commands_state_graph.rs
